terms.label: Plasmid vector
terms.description: Circular DNA helper construct used as a cloning, expression, reporter, or propagation backbone.

terms.label: Escherichia coli
terms.description: Bacterial host system commonly used for plasmid propagation and protein expression.

terms.label: Cloning site
terms.description: Sequence interval intended to receive an insert, such as an MCS or defined entry cassette.

routine_hints.rationale: Vocabulary term component_kind:cloning_site marks an insert-entry context, so restriction-family subcloning should remain visible.

terms.label: Fusion tag
terms.description: Coding sequence intended to be fused in frame to a protein product for purification, detection, solubility, or localization.

routine_hints.rationale: Vocabulary term component_kind:fusion_tag favors scar-aware overlap assembly for in-frame CDS insertion.
Vocabulary term component_kind:fusion_tag favors scar-aware overlap assembly for in-frame CDS insertion.
Vocabulary term component_kind:fusion_tag favors scar-aware overlap assembly for in-frame CDS insertion.

terms.label: Protease cleavage site
terms.description: Short peptide sequence recognized by a protease for removing or processing a fused protein segment.

routine_hints.rationale: Vocabulary term component_kind:protease_site marks a frame-sensitive peptide feature that benefits from scar-aware assembly planning.
Vocabulary term component_kind:protease_site marks a frame-sensitive peptide feature that benefits from scar-aware assembly planning.
Vocabulary term component_kind:protease_site marks a frame-sensitive peptide feature that benefits from scar-aware assembly planning.

terms.label: Selectable marker
terms.description: Genetic element that allows selection of host cells carrying the helper construct.

terms.label: Ampicillin selection
terms.description: Selection context using ampicillin or beta-lactam resistance.

terms.label: Insert cloning
terms.description: Helper affords insertion of a DNA fragment into a designated cloning context.

routine_hints.rationale: Vocabulary term offered_function:insert_cloning marks a general insert-entry affordance.

terms.label: Fusion tagging
terms.description: Helper affords in-frame protein tagging of an inserted coding sequence.

terms.label: Protease cleavage
terms.description: Helper includes or supports a peptide cleavage site for tag removal or processing.

terms.label: Blue/white screening
terms.description: Helper supports lacZ alpha disruption or an equivalent colony-screening readout.
